overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic corporate lobby (Arasaka Tower from Cyberpunk 2077), transitioning from holographic data displays to a grand atrium with digital billboards, illuminated seating, and indoor trees. The game engine footage features high-quality ray-traced reflections, neon accent lighting, and scattered pedestrians in business attire.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along a wall of holographic data displays and analytics charts

entered.detail: large transparent screen displaying cyan-colored graphs, waveforms, and data visualizations
oscillating line charts and statistical readouts in blue-green hues
bar graphs and analytical diagrams floating on the transparent interface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a close-up view of a futuristic holographic data wall displaying various cyan-colored charts and graphs. The camera moves steadily forward along the reflective marble floor, with the digital interface dominating the field of view in an enclosed corridor setting.

events.description: exits the holographic display corridor into an open elevator lobby with visible staircase

agents.ego_description: turning right to reveal the elevator bank and modern staircase while leaving the data wall behind

entered.detail: sleek dark staircase with metallic railings ascending to upper levels
row of elevators with warm illuminated door frames and call buttons

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to exit the data corridor, revealing a modern elevator lobby with illuminated elevator doors and a sleek staircase. The holographic displays fade from view as the architecture transitions to dark walls with accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand atrium with digital timeline exhibit

events.description: enters the main atrium revealing the large digital billboard and futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious lobby while observing the digital exhibits and architectural features

notable_agents.action: business-dressed figure walking across the atrium floor in the distance

entered.detail: massive screen displaying historical timeline with years 2067, 2071, 2074 and Arasaka corporate text
sleek black cars with red accent lighting parked in the lobby
large indoor bonsai-style tree with twisted trunk and green canopy
angular black seating with glowing red neon edges
angled metallic structure with digital interface and red lighting accents

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast atrium featuring a massive digital billboard displaying a historical timeline. Futuristic vehicles are parked near the back wall, while stylized indoor trees and red-lit benches define the seating area. The camera moves forward through the polished space, revealing the grand scale of the corporate lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: central seating area with neon accents

events.description: navigates around the central tree and seating installation

agents.ego_description: circling around the central seating area and passing close to the indoor tree installation

notable_agents.action: seated individual in dark suit resting on the illuminated red bench

entered.detail: artistic tree roots illuminated with red neon lighting near the seating

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the central seating area, passing close to the large stylized tree and red neon benches. A person sits on one of the illuminated benches while the camera navigates around the installation. The digital billboard remains visible in the background as the perspective shifts.

events.description: enters darker corridor area with reduced ambient lighting and focused accent lights

agents.ego_description: proceeding into the darker rear corridors of the building, passing other individuals

notable_agents.action: figure in red jacket walking away into the darkened corridor ahead

entered.detail: narrow passageway with dark walls and minimal lighting leading deeper into the structure
illuminated sign with green text reading CYBER partially visible on the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a darker, narrower corridor with significantly reduced lighting. The bright atrium fades behind as the environment transitions to shadowed hallways with only accent lighting and a visible 'CYBER' sign. Other pedestrians are seen walking ahead into the dimly lit passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an enclosed holographic data corridor into a grand corporate atrium before receding into a dimly lit passage. It begins with a close-up of cyan-colored digital charts on a holographic wall, moving steadily forward across a reflective marble floor. As the camera turns right to exit the corridor, the digital interfaces fade away to reveal a sleek elevator lobby with dark walls and accent lighting. The scene then opens into a vast atrium dominated by a massive historical timeline billboard, where the camera glides past stylized indoor trees and red-lit benches occupied by a seated figure. Finally, the bright expanse of the lobby fades behind as the perspective shifts into a narrower, shadowed hallway marked by a glowing CYBER sign and distant pedestrians.
